task_description: Execute Phase 10 (Realtime, Notifications, Event Backbone) and Phase 11 (Data Plane, Sync, Offline, Reliability) of the Quant Ecosystem autonomous build plan. Add event schema registry, notification fanout, idempotency keys, ws-gateway integration, dead letter queues, optimistic updates, offline queue, retry/backoff, conflict UI store, data retention, and sync status indicator.

verification.summary: All gates pass: typecheck 72/72, build 51/51, test 75/75, lint 61/61, audit 0 high. Tests exercise real logic paths with proper assertions on new code.
